Report boosterpak project status

Source: R/status.R
status.Rd

Report boosterpak project status

Usage

status(root = ".", verbose = NULL)

Arguments

root

Project root.

verbose

Whether to print routine summaries.

Value

A list describing project status, invisibly. Includes config validity, declared and resolved packs, package and missing-package counts, attach state, materialized function drift/missing counts, pack catalog counts, selected package-library strategy and path, renv state, lockfile presence, and .Rprofile hook state.

On this page
